error_signature: validation error in User Prompt field
title: Validation error when using custom text in User Prompt
symptom: When attempting to use `message.content` in the User Prompt field, a validation error occurs, making it impossible to see the exact issue.
applies_when: Dragging and dropping content into User Prompt field
not_this_if: Using predefined options in the dropdown
root_cause: The User Prompt field in the AI Agent node only accepts predefined options from a dropdown and does not support custom text input directly. Attempting to input custom text leads to a validation error.
fix_steps: Select the 'Define Below' option from the dropdown in the User Prompt field
Manually enter your desired text into the prompt field
Save the changes and test the workflow again
agent_instruction: Select 'Define Below' in the User Prompt dropdown and enter your text manually.
